mapping_policy: Preserve the source cell ID-to-image-anchor relationship exactly; never deduplicate repeated artwork.
render_policy: Extract only top/front/right from the source cross net, remove only the outer cut line, preserve source geometry, apply the locked fine-print deblock pass, and raise chroma by 5.5 percent; apply the approved balanced-clear pass and lightly blend internal high-frequency blocks.

texture_profile.name: fine_print_v4_balanced_smooth
texture_profile.geometry_policy: Preserve source artwork, line positions, and face registration exactly.

camera_policy: Fixed near-front camera showing only top/front/right.
